PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>

PREFIX psn: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value-normalized/>

SELECT DISTINCT ?country ?countryLabel WHERE {
  ?country wdt:P31 wd:Q6256 .
  ?country wdt:P30 wd:Q49 .
  ?country p:P1326 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P1326 wd:Q9375 .
  ?statement pq:P595 ?percentage .
  ?percentage psn:P595 ?percentValue .
  FILTER(?percentValue > 50.0)
  OPTIONAL {
    ?country rdfs:label ?countryLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?countryLabel) = 'en')
  }
}
